title: Security: Insufficient CORS Check Leads to Cross-Origin Size Leak via BackgroundFetch API
description_snippet:
**VULNERABILITY DETAILS**   
This issue is similar to https://crbug.com/chromium/915446. By using the BackgroundFetch API it is possible to request a cross-origin site with cookies and leak the exact response size if the server responds with a `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: \*` header. Usually CORS r
